title: Changes to form-trigger.handlebars not persisting in Docker
symptom: After modifying the form-trigger.handlebars file in Docker, changes revert upon restart.
root_cause: Docker containers are ephemeral, meaning any changes made inside the container will be lost upon restart unless the files are properly mounted from the host system.
fix_steps: Copy the modified form-trigger.handlebars file to the desired location on your host machine.
Update your Docker Compose file to mount the host file to the correct path in the container.
Restart the Docker container to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Ensure the form-trigger.handlebars file is correctly mounted in your Docker setup.
